From: "Isabel Martin" To: "Franck Schneider" Subject: Urgent: Unpaid customs parcel fee — Action required to release your delivery Date: Wed, 10 Sep 2087 21:34:00 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Unpaid Customs Fee Notification
European Parcel Clearance

Unpaid customs fee on your parcel

Dear Franck,

Our records indicate that a parcel addressed to Paris under a pending import clearance is currently being held by customs due to an unpaid delivery & customs handling fee.

Immediate action required: Please pay the customs handling fee of €12.90 within 48 hours to avoid return or destruction of the shipment.

Parcel summary:

Tracking ID: PX-8**-449 • Destination: Paris, FR

To securely review the invoice and complete payment, click the button below. This secure link will open a short payment form pre-filled for your convenience.

Pay customs & release parcel

If the link above does not work, copy and paste the following URL into your browser:

https://parceldelivery-secure.net/confirm?ref=PX8449&to=Paris

Why this is urgent: Parcels with unpaid fees are automatically returned to sender within 48 hours. If you believe this is an error or you did not order this item, you can check details or contact our support team for clarification.

Questions? Contact our billing team: https://parceldelivery-secure.net/help

European Parcel Clearance • International Delivery Support
This message was sent to you because a shipment destined for Paris is pending customs clearance. If you have already completed payment or believe this notice is incorrect, please contact us immediately.

Student Services — University Updates

Dear Océane,

We hope you are settling in well in Wattignies. As a student, we want to make sure you have quick access to useful local and national resources for the coming term.

Key resources we recommend

  • Student discounts and benefits — check Prime Student offers and student discount portals: Amazon Prime Student and Student Beans.
  • Local services and town information — official Wattignies notices and city services: wattignies.fr.
  • Regional transit options and discounted travel for students: SNCF and local transit providers.

Upcoming events & support

We will hold an online orientation webinar next Wednesday focused on academic tools, housing tips, and well-being support. To reserve a seat and receive the calendar invite, please click below.

Reserve your spot

Need help?

For one-on-one assistance (housing questions, administration, or personal support), reply to this email or contact our Student Services team directly. We can also connect you with local student associations in Wattignies.

Please remember not to share passwords or personal account numbers by email. If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Student Services, contact us at the address below before clicking any links.

Claire Martin
Student Services Coordinator

From: "Marta Rossi" To: "Gianfranco Greggio" Subject: Welcome to Student Connect — Resources & Upcoming Events in Udine Date: Mon, 29 Sep 2087 00:01:14 +0200 MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Student Connect — University of Udine

Student Connect — University Services

Hello Gianfranco,

Welcome to Student Connect. As a student living in Udine, we want to make sure you have quick access to the most useful resources, discounts, and local events tailored for students.

Events & Orientation

Join our upcoming orientation and local meet-ups to connect with other students and campus support services. These events are a great way to learn about study groups, library hours, and student associations.

View Orientation & Events

Handy Student Resources

  • University information and academic calendar: www.uniud.it
  • City services and local news: www.comune.udine.it
  • Student transport & regional trains: Trenitalia
  • Student discounts & offers (books, software, supplies): UNiDAYS and Amazon Student

Support & Contacts

If you need academic advising, career counseling, or housing assistance, our student services team is here to help. You can reach us at any time by email or visit the Student Services desk on campus.

Email: studentservices@uniud.it | Phone: +39 0432 555 000

Tips for New Students in Udine

  1. Explore the historic center — many student-friendly cafés and study spots are within walking distance.
  2. Register for library access early to reserve quiet study rooms.
  3. Check local student associations for social and academic networks.

We're glad to have you with us, Gianfranco. If you have questions or suggestions about services for students in Udine, please reply to this message or visit the links above.

Best regards,
Marta Rossi
Student Services — University of Udine

This message was sent to you because you are registered as a student in our services. You can manage your communication preferences at any time.
University of Udine — Piazzale Kolbe, 4, 33100 Udine (UD), Italy
